topic.title: 어항 관리
topic.description: 어항을 깨끗하게 유지하고 물고기에게 적절한 환경을 제공하는 기본적인 방법을 배웁니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 그리고 일주일에 한 번 물을 20% 정도 갈아주는 것이 좋아요.
어항 온도를 꾸준히 확인하는 것도 잊지 마세요.
이렇게 하면 물고기들이 건강하게 지낼 수 있어요.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Hello! It's my first time managing a fish tank.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Hello! | It's my first time | managing a fish tank.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: What is the most important thing?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: What is | the most important thing?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Feed the fish a little bit every day.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Feed the fish | a little bit | every day.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: And it's good to change about 20% of the water once a week.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: And it's good | to change about 20% of the water | once a week.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Also, don't forget to consistently check the tank's temperature.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Also, | don't forget | to consistently check | the tank's temperature.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Doing this helps the fish stay healthy.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Doing this | helps the fish | stay healthy.

keyword_speeches.target_sentence: Hello! It's my first time managing a fish tank.
What is the most important thing?
Feed the fish a little bit every day.
And it's good to change about 20% of the water once a week.
Also, don't forget to consistently check the tank's temperature.
Doing this helps the fish stay healthy.
